All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
GameController
Controller for the main game view. .
ILevels
Defines the contract for managing game levels and progression. .
IWords
Defines the contract for word management in the game. .
Levels
Implements the game level system and progression logic. .
Main
Entry point of the Typing Speed Game application. .
MenuController
Controller for the main menu view.
Path
Utility class that stores the paths to all FXML views used in the application. .
ResultsController
Controller for the results view.
SceneManager
Manages scene transitions within the application. .
Words
Handles word generation and validation for the typing game. .
